Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestFormulaInspector

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestFormulaInspector
public class TestFormulaInspector extends Object
Ensures that finding accumulators work as expected for addition of new findings. Also ensures that skipping nodes during inspections is properly implemented. The other aspects of formula inspection are actually tested in class TestSubFormulas.

  • Field Summary
